construction.panels: Standard front, back, and two set-in sleeve panels.
construction.seams: Standard single-needle stitching visible at the neckband, sleeve hems, and bottom hem. All seams are tone-on-tone white.
construction.details: Ribbed crew neckband, short sleeves, straight bottom hem.

branding.primary_logo: Black woven label with 'Skyy Rose' in a flowing gold script font.
branding.logo_location: Interior back neck, visible from the front as a tag.
branding.secondary_marks: Small square woven patch on the upper left sleeve, approximately 1" x 1". The patch is black with a gold graphic, appearing to be a stylized 'SR' monogram or a simplified rose emblem.

unique_features: Prominent woven neck label and a distinctive small square woven brand patch on the left sleeve.
collection_aesthetic: Clean, understated luxury streetwear with subtle branding elements, reflecting an Oakland grit aesthetic through refined details.
